en: You see, I've spent most of my life in Europe. Oh, that's capital.
ja: ほら、人生のほとんどをヨーロッパで過ごしたんだ。
zhTW: 你看，我大部分人生都在歐洲度過。
vi: Ban biet day, toi da song phan lon cuoc doi o chau Au.

en: You shouldn't use words like that. Says who?
ko: 그런 말은 쓰지 말아야 해. 누가 그래?
ja: そんな言葉を使っちゃダメ。誰が言ったの？
zhTW: 你不應該用那種字眼。誰說的？
vi: Ban khong nen dung tu nhu vay. Ai noi the?

en: Oh, Meg. She's my older sister. Here.
ko: 오, 메그, 그녀는 내 언니야. 여기.
zhTW: 哦，梅格，她是我姐姐。這裡。
vi: O, Meg, chi ay la chi gai toi. Day.

en: Oh, that's her. See? The girl in the violet dress?
zhTW: 穿紫色洋裝的那個女生？
vi: Co gai mac vay tim do?

en: It's very pretty. She reminds me to be good, so Father will be proud of me when he returns.
ja: 父が帰ってきた時に誇りに思ってもらえるように。
zhTW: 這樣爸爸回來時會為我感到驕傲。
vi: de khi bo tro ve se tu hao ve toi.

en: Where is he? He volunteered for the Union Army, and I wanted to go fight with him.
ja: 私も一緒に戦いたかった。
zhTW: 我也想跟他一起去打仗。
vi: va toi muon di chien dau cung bo.

en: I can't get over my disappointment in being a girl.
ko: 여자라는 사실에 실망을 극복할 수 없어.
ja: 女の子であることの失望を乗り越えられない。
zhTW: 身為女生的失望讓我難以釋懷。
vi: Toi khong the vuot qua noi that vong vi la con gai.

en: Jo, would you like to dance with me? I can't because...
ja: ジョー、一緒に踊らない？
vi: Jo, ban muon nhay voi toi khong?

en: Because of what? You won't tell?
vi: Toi khong the vi... Vi sao?

en: Never. I scorched my dress, see?
ja: ドレスを焦がしちゃったの、見て？
zhTW: 我把裙子燒焦了，看到了嗎？
vi: Toi da lam chay vay roi, thay khong?

en: There. And Meg told me to keep still so no one would see it.
ko: 저기, 메그가 아무도 보지 않게 가만히 있으라고 했어.
ja: メグが誰にも見られないようにじっとしてろって。
zhTW: 在那裡，梅格叫我不要動，這樣就沒人會看到。
vi: Kia kia, Meg bao toi dung yen de khong ai thay.

en: You can laugh if you want to, it's funny, I know.
ja: 笑っていいよ、面白いってわかってるから。
zhTW: 你可以笑，我知道很好笑。
vi: Ban cuoi cung duoc, toi biet no buon cuoi.
